llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm (ai_assisted) vs. control. The ai_assisted arm provided access to one of thirteen different LLMs.
llm_extracted.notes: Sample sizes extracted from Table 2 (page 30): control group n=42 (from constant row showing 479 total observations minus 437 in treatment), AI-assisted group n=437. The paper reports '0.34 standard deviations' which is treated as Cohen's d. P-value reported as inequality 'p < 0.001' rather than exact value. Means are regression-adjusted controlling for profession and task (3.32 control, 3.91 AI-assisted from Table 2). SDs are not provided in the regression output tables.
source_quotes: Simultaneously, AI assistance raised output quality by 0.6 points (p < 0.001), an increase of 18% or 0.34 standard deviations.
Table 2: Impact of AI Assistance on Output Quality (Grade ≠ 0) ... Observations 479 479

computed.notes: Sample sizes extracted from Table 2 (page 30): control group n=42 (from constant row showing 479 total observations minus 437 in treatment), AI-assisted group n=437. The paper reports '0.34 standard deviations' which is treated as Cohen's d. P-value reported as inequality 'p < 0.001' rather than exact value. Means are regression-adjusted controlling for profession and task (3.32 control, 3.91 AI-assisted from Table 2). SDs are not provided in the regression output tables.
